description:
This protocol prepares the required input files for BayesPrism and then run BayesPrism on the samples.
Input: A csv file defining the regions for deconvolution.
Parameters:
* Fragments: Reference scATAC-seq fragments for each cell type
* ObsPls: Bulk signal for one sample on the forward strand (bigWig), expects multiple samples
* ObsMns: Bulk signal for one sample on the reverse strand (bigWig), expects multiple samples
* ObsLabels: Labels for each bulk sample
* LatPls: Ground truth signal for each cell type on the forward strand (bigWig)
* LatMns: Ground truth signal for each cell type on the reverse strand (bigWig)
* LatLabels: Labels for each ground truth cell type
name: Run BayesPrism
